description: Curated YouTube video resources for CSS design systems

videos.title: Create a Design System with CSS - Web Development Course
videos.creator: freeCodeCamp.org
videos.description: Full course with Kevin Powell on building a design system from scratch while creating a Space Travel website with CSS custom properties and tokens.

videos.title: Build bulletproof color systems
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Building robust color systems for design systems using CSS relative colors, contrast-color(), and systematic naming conventions.

videos.title: CSS Variables - An introduction to CSS custom properties
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Introduction to CSS custom properties as the foundation of design systems including scoping, fallbacks, and practical usage.

videos.title: How to create a theme switcher with HTML & CSS
videos.creator: Kevin Powell
videos.description: Building a color theme switcher using custom properties and :has() selector, with localStorage persistence and fallback strategies.

videos.title: Master CSS Custom Properties | Tutorial from Kevin Powell
videos.creator: Frontend Masters
videos.description: Advanced custom property techniques including locally scoped properties, fallbacks, and @property for registered custom properties in design systems.
